title: planner proposal
description: Issue #11. The planner (lookahead) role's ADVISORY output, written read-only to /tmp/<team>/planner/proposed.json. It PROPOSES; the lead disposes (single-writer stack/map). PR-BLIND: references issues/clusters/branches only, NEVER a PR number or CR finding. Seed is {"flags": []}.

flags.description: Advisory flags. Empty array = nothing to propose (the seed state).

kind.description: overlap = >=2 live branches (and/or open PRs, #12) touch shared files; sizing = a branch exceeds the sizing budget; next-tranche = the now-unblocked clusters after a recorded merge.

branches.description: Branch names involved (overlap: the colliding set; sizing: the single oversized branch). PR-blind - branch names, never PR numbers.

clusters.description: Issue/cluster ids the proposal concerns (next-tranche: the proposed runnable set).

conflicting_paths.description: overlap only: the file paths shared across `branches` (the exact, diff-confirmed collision set).

stats.description: sizing only: the measured diff size that tripped the budget.

unblocked_by.description: next-tranche only: the merged issue/cluster ref whose merge unblocked this tranche (recorded at the lead's checkpoint, not an unobservable on-merge hook).

proposal.description: The advisory action for the lead to ratify or reject (e.g. serialize these branches, split this branch, dispatch these clusters).
